---
title: "Courses"
subtitle: "Curated pathways through notes, interactives, exercises and further reading."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: mn-courses-available
    contents: resources
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    fields: [image, title, description, date]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    feed:
      items: 20
      type: partial
      title: "Math Nomad course materials"
---

::: {.content-block .mn-page-lead}
Each course pathway is designed as a guided route through Math Nomad’s material: a clear starting point, a sequence of ideas and links between notes, interactives, problems and further reading.
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-course-status-key}
<p class="mn-kicker">COURSE STATUS</p>

::: {.mn-three-up}
::: {.mn-status-card .is-available}
### Available

A useful pathway or classroom-ready resource is ready to use now.
:::

::: {.mn-status-card .is-developing}
### In development

Substantial material is being assembled and a first usable release is on its way.
:::

::: {.mn-status-card .is-planned}
### Planned

The pathway belongs in the long-term map, but there is not yet enough material to make a useful page.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-listing-section}
<p class="mn-kicker">AVAILABLE NOW</p>

## Begin with a complete investigation

This first investigation can be used in a classroom, a teacher circle or an undergraduate problem-solving group without waiting for a full course pathway.

::: {#mn-courses-available}
:::
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-course-planned}
<p class="mn-kicker">PLANNED PATHWAYS</p>

## Courses on the map

These names mark future directions; they are not links to empty pages. A course will move to **In development** only when there is a concrete sample or schedule, and to **Available** when it offers a genuinely useful path.

::: {.mn-course-shelf}
::: {.mn-course-shelf-item}
<span>Elementary Number Theory</span>
<span class="mn-course-shelf-status">Planned</span>
:::
::: {.mn-course-shelf-item}
<span>Linear Algebra</span>
<span class="mn-course-shelf-status">Planned</span>
:::
::: {.mn-course-shelf-item}
<span>Real Analysis</span>
<span class="mn-course-shelf-status">Planned</span>
:::
::: {.mn-course-shelf-item}
<span>Complex Analysis</span>
<span class="mn-course-shelf-status">Planned</span>
:::
::: {.mn-course-shelf-item}
<span>Group Theory</span>
<span class="mn-course-shelf-status">Planned</span>
:::
::: {.mn-course-shelf-item}
<span>Ring Theory</span>
<span class="mn-course-shelf-status">Planned</span>
:::
::: {.mn-course-shelf-item}
<span>Probability Theory</span>
<span class="mn-course-shelf-status">Planned</span>
:::
::: {.mn-course-shelf-item}
<span>Discrete Mathematics</span>
<span class="mn-course-shelf-status">Planned</span>
:::
:::
:::
